paywall.disclaimer: Herblore provides general wellness information for educational purposes only. It is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. Always consult your healthcare provider.

disclaimer.title: Before We Begin
disclaimer.body1: Herblore is an educational wellness reference. The information provided is for general knowledge and is not medical advice.
disclaimer.body2: Never replace professional medical guidance with information from this app. Always consult a qualified healthcare provider before starting any supplement.
disclaimer.body3: If you are pregnant, nursing, taking medication, or have a medical condition, seek professional advice before use.
disclaimer.bullet1: This app does not diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
disclaimer.bullet2: Supplement dosages are general guidelines from published research.
disclaimer.bullet3: Individual responses may vary — what works for others may not work for you.
disclaimer.bullet4: Interactions listed may not be exhaustive. Always inform your doctor.
disclaimer.footerNote: You can review this disclaimer anytime in Settings.
